tasker.aspect_ratio_warning.title: 🚨 Warning: Resolution requirement not met! 🚨
tasker.aspect_ratio_warning.desc: 💡 Adjust the resolution and run the task again.
tasker.aspect_ratio_warning.requirement_: Exact %dx%d; other 16:9 resolutions such as 1920x1080 are not accepted
16:9 aspect ratio and at least 1280x720; for example 3840x2160, 2560x1440, 1920x1080, 1280x720
tasker.hdr_warning.title: ⚠️ Warning: HDR is enabled
tasker.hdr_warning.desc: 💡 HDR may cause issues with image recognition.
tasker.hdr_warning.recommend_1: • Disable HDR in your monitor settings
tasker.hdr_warning.recommend_2: • Or turn off HDR in Windows Settings → System → Display → HDR
tasker.hdr_warning.recommend_3: • Restart the task after disabling HDR
tasker.hdr_warning.note: ℹ️ The task will continue, but may fail.
tasker.membership_warning.title: 🍊 Warning: Daily runtime quota exhausted!
tasker.membership_warning.desc: 💡 Today's runtime quota is exhausted. Wait for the 4:00 AM reset or upgrade your membership tier.
tasker.membership_warning.requirement: Quota: refreshes daily at 4:00 AM by tier
tasker.membership_warning.tip: 💡 All features are available. Upgrade for more daily runtime.
tasker.membership_check.verified: 🍊 Current tier %s, about %d/%d minutes used today
tasker.membership_check.debt: 🍊 About %d minutes of previous over-quota runtime have been carried over and will be deducted from today's quota.
tasker.membership_check.denied: 🍊 Today's quota for %s (%d minutes) is exhausted; task stopped. Device binding/subscription URL: %s
tasker.membership_check.denied_debt: 🍊 Today's quota for %s (%d minutes) has been exhausted by previous over-quota runtime; task stopped. Device binding/subscription URL: %s
tasker.membership_check.debug_unlimited: 🍊 Debug builds have unlimited runtime and skip membership checks.
tasker.membership_check.update_required: 🍊 This MDA version is no longer supported. Please update to %s or later before running tasks.
tasker.process_warning.title: ⚠️ Note: The following processes are running
tasker.process_warning.recommend_1: ℹ️ Please turn off OSD FPS overlays and filters
tasker.process_warning.note: 💡 These features interfere with image recognition
